mapper.select: SELECT waiver_id, requested_ratio, party_pool_size, total_eligible_size, status FROM t_party_ratio_waiver WHERE subject_id = #{subjectId} AND status = #{approvedStatus} ORDER BY update_time DESC, waiver_id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN is_party_member = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS party_count, COUNT(1) AS eligible_count FROM t_election_candidate WHERE subject_id = #{subjectId} AND qualification_status = 2
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_waiver_snapshot_comparison ( waiver_id, subject_id, trigger_phase, recorded_party_count, recorded_eligible_count, recorded_ratio, current_party_count, current_eligible_count, current_natural_ratio, delta_party, delta_eligible, action_taken, audit_hash ) VALUES ( #{waiverId}, #{subjectId}, #{triggerPhase}, #{recordedPartyCount}, #{recordedEligibleCount}, #{recordedRatio}, #{currentPartyCount}, #{currentEligibleCount}, #{currentNaturalRatio}, #{deltaParty}, #{deltaEligible}, #{actionTaken}, #{auditHash} )
